flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New Mexico State University-Main Campus rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.3k → $8.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New Mexico State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at New Mexico State University-Main Campus rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (26.0% → 33.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at New Mexico State University-Main Campus rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (10.7k → 11.9k).
